Key Features/Specializations: High-performance graph database (historically powered Wikidata Query Service).
Enterprise knowledge graph platform with virtual graphs (data virtualization) and logic reasoning.
Massively Parallel Processing (MPP) native graph database designed for distributed analytics.
Component of the Apache Jena framework; a native
Java framework for processing RDF data that includes an in-memory and disk-based triplestore.
Enterprise RDF semantic graph support built natively into Oracle Database.
